_comment: REFERENCE ONLY — `npm run register-mcp` writes this entry for you automatically (idempotent, OS-aware, merges with existing config). This file documents what the script produces, plus an alternative shape if you'd rather have Claude launch its own mikser instance without a separate `npm start`.

mikser-io-example-blog._note: MCP is now plugin-activated (mikser-io-mcp listed in this project's mikser.config.js plugins array). The supergateway shim bridges Claude Desktop's stdio transport to mikser's HTTP transport at /mcp. Run `npm start` first so the server is up.
